purpose: Codify auto-absorb mandate as a .own rule (own:atlas-absorb-mandatory) with 3-layer enforcement triad (os-level launchd sweeper + agent-level canonical witness_emit helper + advisory-tier lint scanner). Locks in the prior cycle's auto-absorb wiring against regression: every ω-cycle witness emitted under <core>/{nexus,n6-architecture,anima}/design/**/*omega_cycle*.json MUST be absorbed into atlas.n6 (per-cycle shard + delta merge). User-imposed hard constraints this cycle: claude-dependency=0 (every layer runs without Claude Code session) + hooks=0 (no PreToolUse/PostToolUse, no .git/hooks, no fswatch).

trigger.english_paraphrase: User: register as .own rule in nexus, with triad enforcement, fired via subagent ω-cycle, and the hard constraints — zero Claude Code dependency, zero hooks of any kind.

claude_dependency_audit.verdict: 0 functional references — only explicit 'NONE' disclaimer comments in witness_emit.hexa header and atlas_absorb_lint.hexa header
claude_dependency_audit.with_claude_uninstalled_mental_sim: all 3 layers run as plain hexa interpreter invocations: launchd fires sweeper at StartInterval=600s, witness_emit is invoked by emitters as a function call (caller chooses; not triggered by any harness), lint is a CLI scanner. No layer requires .claude/settings.json, no layer requires an agent session, no layer references claude-cli or claude-agent.

hook_audit.claude_hooks: 0 — no PreToolUse / PostToolUse / SessionStart references in triad code or plist
hook_audit.git_hooks: 0 — no .git/hooks/* writes, no .githooks/ adds, raw 13 dev.hexa-lang.git-hook-ban honored
hook_audit.fswatch: 0 — sweeper is a polling launchd StartInterval timer (600s), not a filesystem watcher
hook_audit.chflags_uchg_baits: 0 — no per-file immutability locks added by triad layers

own_entry_text: (see /Users/ghost/core/nexus/.own appended block; see also own_entry_text_literal field below)
own_entry_text_literal:
own 1 live "atlas-absorb-mandatory — every ω-cycle witness JSON under <core>/{nexus,n6-architecture,anima}/design/**/*omega_cycle*.json must be absorbed into atlas.n6 (per-cycle shard atlas.append.<slug>.n6 + delta merge); enforcement = launchd sweeper + canonical witness_emit helper + lint scanner triad; claude-dependency NONE; hooks NONE"
  slug atlas-absorb-mandatory
  enforce-layer os-level
  enforce-layer-secondary hive-agent
  enforce-layer-rationale layer 1 = launchd StartInterval=600s sweeper (os-level periodic catch-all). layer 2 = canonical witness_emit helper (agent-level structural — single canonical entry point all emitters call to atomically write+absorb; bypass detected by lint). layer 3 (advisory tier — see note enforce-layer-tertiary) = lint scanner for orphan detection + bypass audit. NO claude code hooks, NO git hooks, NO fswatch. Sweeper polls; helper is invoked by callers; lint runs on demand.
  enforce tool/atlas_absorb_lint.hexa
  decl tool/atlas_absorb_sweeper.hexa
  decl tool/witness_emit.hexa
  decl tool/atlas_absorb_lint.hexa
  decl launchd/dev.hexa-lang.atlas-absorb-sweeper.plist
  scope every witness JSON whose path matches <core>/{nexus,n6-architecture,anima}/design/**/*omega_cycle*.json must be absorbed via omega_cycle_atlas_ingest --witness <abs> (single-witness scope, raw 65 idempotent skip on already-absorbed). "absorbed" = (per-cycle shard atlas.append.<slug>.n6 exists with non-zero size) OR (cycle-slug grep-hit in main nexus/n6/atlas.n6).
  why prior cycle (2026-04-26_kick_auto_absorb_omega_cycle.json) wired auto-absorb on the kick_dispatch path + flipped omega-ingest default to absorb, but those wires are tool-local. This cycle codifies as .own contract so all current AND future ω-cycle emitters (across nexus + n6-architecture + anima) are covered by the triad regression-protected. Hard constraints user-imposed 2026-04-26: claude-dependency=0 (every layer runs without Claude Code session) + hooks=0 (no PreToolUse/PostToolUse, no .git/hooks, no fswatch).
  proof tool/atlas_absorb_lint.hexa --selftest
  proof tool/atlas_absorb_sweeper.hexa --once --dry-run
  proof tool/witness_emit.hexa --selftest
  deps raw:hard-implementation-default
  deps raw:execution-audit-append-only-ledger
  deps raw:ai-native-error-message
  deps raw:execution-sentinel-result-decoding
  deps raw:no-git-hooks
  pattern __ATLAS_ABSORB_SWEEP__ <PASS|FAIL> total=<N> already_absorbed=<N> newly_absorbed=<N> errors=<N>
  pattern __ATLAS_ABSORB_LINT__ <PASS|FAIL> total=<N> orphans=<N> already=<N>
  pattern __WITNESS_EMIT__ <PASS|FAIL> path=<path> shard=<path> absorbed=<true|false>
  note claude-dependency NONE — every layer is self-sufficient: launchd timer fires sweeper without any agent harness; witness_emit is a plain hexa fn invoked by callers; lint is CLI scanner. Verified by grep audit (0 functional refs to claude-code/.claude/claude-cli; only explicit NONE disclaimers).
  note hooks NONE — no claude code hooks (PreToolUse/PostToolUse), no git hooks (per hive raw 13 dev.hexa-lang.git-hook-ban + memory project_git_hook_ban_2026_04_26), no fswatch-style filesystem watchers. The launchd sweeper is a polling StartInterval timer, NOT a filesystem watcher.
  note enforce-layer-tertiary advisory — lint layer is the third tier of the enforcement ladder (raw 43 hard-implementation-default ladder vocabulary). Schema-extension of hive raw 2 keys whitelist to add `enforce-layer-tertiary` deferred to a future cross-repo cycle (hive/.raw is chflags uchg locked; raw_loader is permissive on unknown keys).
  note bypass-detection — Layer 3 lint detects orphan witnesses (= Layer 2 helper bypassed AND Layer 1 sweeper not yet swept). F29 redundancy proven: with any single layer down, the other 2 still catch.
fixpoint_marker: REACHED — F24+F26+F27+F28+F29+F30+F31+F32 all PASS via real smokes; F25 PASS_WITH_DOCUMENTED_OBSTRUCTION (tertiary schema-extend deferred, non-blocking); claude-dependency=0 + hooks=0 audited and verified.
